mapper.select: SELECT ID AS id, LOG_ID AS logId, LOG_RESULT_FAILURE_TYPE AS logResultFailureType, LOG_RESULT_FAILURE_TITLE AS logResultFailureTitle, LOG_RESULT_FAILURE_DESC AS logResultFailureDesc, LOG_RESULT_ONE_LINE_SUMMARY AS logResultOneLineSummary, LOG_RESULT_ONE_LINE_SUB AS logResultOneLineSub, LOG_RESULT_EXTERNAL_RATIO AS logResultExternalRatio, LOG_RESULT_INTERNAL_RATIO AS logResultInternalRatio, LOG_RESULT_FLOW_SITUATION AS logResultFlowSituation, LOG_RESULT_FLOW_DECISION AS logResultFlowDecision, LOG_RESULT_FLOW_RESULT AS logResultFlowResult, LOG_RESULT_LOG_KEY_DECISION AS logResultLogKeyDecision, LOG_RESULT_LOG_EXTERNAL_FACTOR AS logResultLogExternalFactor, LOG_RESULT_LOG_INTERNAL_FACTOR AS logResultLogInternalFactor FROM TBL_LOG_RESULT WHERE LOG_ID = #{logId}

SELECT ID AS id, LOG_ID AS logId, LOG_RESULT_FAILURE_TYPE AS logResultFailureType, LOG_RESULT_FAILURE_TITLE AS logResultFailureTitle, LOG_RESULT_FAILURE_DESC AS logResultFailureDesc, LOG_RESULT_ONE_LINE_SUMMARY AS logResultOneLineSummary, LOG_RESULT_ONE_LINE_SUB AS logResultOneLineSub, LOG_RESULT_EXTERNAL_RATIO AS logResultExternalRatio, LOG_RESULT_INTERNAL_RATIO AS logResultInternalRatio, LOG_RESULT_FLOW_SITUATION AS logResultFlowSituation, LOG_RESULT_FLOW_DECISION AS logResultFlowDecision, LOG_RESULT_FLOW_RESULT AS logResultFlowResult, LOG_RESULT_LOG_KEY_DECISION AS logResultLogKeyDecision, LOG_RESULT_LOG_EXTERNAL_FACTOR AS logResultLogExternalFactor, LOG_RESULT_LOG_INTERNAL_FACTOR AS logResultLogInternalFactor FROM TBL_LOG_RESULT WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_LOG_RESULT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_LOG_RESULT ( ID, LOG_ID, LOG_RESULT_FAILURE_TYPE, LOG_RESULT_FAILURE_TITLE, LOG_RESULT_FAILURE_DESC, LOG_RESULT_ONE_LINE_SUMMARY, LOG_RESULT_ONE_LINE_SUB, LOG_RESULT_EXTERNAL_RATIO, LOG_RESULT_INTERNAL_RATIO, LOG_RESULT_FLOW_SITUATION, LOG_RESULT_FLOW_DECISION, LOG_RESULT_FLOW_RESULT, LOG_RESULT_LOG_KEY_DECISION, LOG_RESULT_LOG_EXTERNAL_FACTOR, LOG_RESULT_LOG_INTERNAL_FACTOR ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{logId}, #{logResultFailureType}, #{logResultFailureTitle}, #{logResultFailureDesc}, #{logResultOneLineSummary}, #{logResultOneLineSub}, #{logResultExternalRatio}, #{logResultInternalRatio}, #{logResultFlowSituation}, #{logResultFlowDecision}, #{logResultFlowResult}, #{logResultLogKeyDecision}, #{logResultLogExternalFactor}, #{logResultLogInternalFactor} )
